data.title: Update REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md to remove hardcoded Python lint commands
data.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Description
Edit REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md to replace Python-specific tool references with generic language.

### Config Reference section edits:
- Find the bullet for commands.lint — change default from 'make lint-ruff' to 'project-configured lint command'
- Find the bullet for commands.type_check — change default from 'make lint-mypy' to 'project-configured type-check command'

### Step 1 command invocation edits:
- Find the Lint check numbered item — replace 'make lint-ruff' with '$commands.lint' (referencing the config key)
- Find the Type check numbered item — replace 'make lint-mypy' with '$commands.type_check' (referencing the config key)

### TDD: RED test pre-written in Task fa27-74aa
Implementation must turn the RED test GREEN — this is the GREEN phase, not an exemption.

### After implementation:
Remove RED markers from .test-index: remove [test_review_workflow_config_ref_generic] and [test_review_workflow_commands_generic] markers.

## Files to Modify
- plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md (EDIT)
- .test-index (EDIT — remove RED markers after GREEN)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Config Reference commands.lint bullet has no 'lint-ruff' in default value
  Verify: ! grep 'commands.lint' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md | grep -qi 'lint-ruff'
- [ ] Config Reference commands.type_check bullet has no 'lint-mypy' in default value
  Verify: ! grep 'commands.type_check' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md | grep -qi 'lint-mypy'
- [ ] Lint check item contains config key reference, not hardcoded command
  Verify: grep -i 'lint check' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md | grep -qi 'commands.lint\|configured'
- [ ] Type check item contains config key reference, not hardcoded command
  Verify: grep -i 'type check' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md | grep -qi 'commands.type_check\|configured'
- [ ] RED markers removed from .test-index
  Verify: ! grep -q '\[test_review_workflow_config_ref_generic\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] test_review_workflow_config_ref_generic and test_review_workflow_commands_generic pass (GREEN)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/docs/test-doc-polyglot-compliance.sh
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh
